title: Avalara AvaTax provider config
description: Configuration shape for an Avalara AvaTax integration.

account_id.description: Avalara account ID. Numeric. Provided by Avalara during onboarding.

license_key.description: Avalara license key (paired with account_id via HTTP Basic auth). Encrypted at rest.

company_code.description: Avalara company code — the specific company within the tenant's Avalara account (multi-entity tenants). Matches Avalara's admin console.

commit_transactions.description: true = commit calculations to Avalara's ledger for reporting. false = calculate but don't commit (uncommitted transactions don't count towards Avalara filings). Set false for real-time preview + true for invoice-line calculations.

default_tax_code.description: Avalara TaxCode (e.g. P0000000 for tangible personal property, D0000000 for digital services). Applied when the calculation doesn't specify one.

customer_use_type.description: Avalara customer_use_type (buyer type). Optional — used for reseller exemptions (E = Charitable Or Benevolent Organization; A = Federal Government; L = Other; etc.).

ecms_enabled.description: true = use Avalara's Exemption Certificate Management System (ECMS) for exemption lookup. false = use Stackra-managed exemptions.
